zh.lifeSummary: 當Heilwig Sophie von Brehna於1209年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛可萊斯 比特費爾德布雷納時，她的父親Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin45歲，母親Jutta von Ziegenhain39歲。她於大約1231年與Dietrich I von Honstein結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年享年64歲。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brehna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): habitational name from a place in Lombardy named Brenna.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farms in southeastern Norway named Brenna, from brenna ‘land cleared for cultivation by burning’.

variants.name: Brena
meanings: Italian (Lombardy, in province of Bergamo): variant of   Brenna  .

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Heilwig Sophie von Brehna was born in 1209, in Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Province of Saxony, Prussia, Germany, her father, Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin, was 45 and her mother, Jutta von Ziegenhain, was 39. She married Dietrich I von Honstein about 1231. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1273, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heilwig Sophie von Brehna est née en 1209, à Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Provinz Sachsen, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Ziegenhain, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich I von Honstein environ 1231. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1273, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.Brehna, Sachsen, Germany: Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heilwig Sophie von Brehna 1209 in Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin 45 und ihre Mutter Jutta von Ziegenhain 39. Sie hat um 1231 Dietrich I von Honstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1273 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwig Sophie von Brehna è nata il nel 1209 nel Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Jutta von Ziegenhain, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich I von Honstein circa 1231. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1273, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.Brehna, Sachsen, Germany: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 작센 크레이스 비터펠드 브레h나
ko.lifeSummary: Heilwig Sophie von Brehna(이)가 1209년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 작센 크레이스 비터펠드 브레h나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta von Ziegenhain(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1231년 Dietrich I von Honstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwig Sophie von Brehna nasceu em 1209, em Brehna, Kreis Bitterfeld, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Ziegenhain, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich I von Honstein aproximadamente 1231. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1273, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heilwig Sophie von Brehna родилась в 1209 г. в местности брэна, крис биттирфелд, провинз сачсен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Friedrich II von Brehna und Wettin было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Ziegenhain, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich I von Honstein около 1231 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1273 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
